---
title: "About"
---

## About This Site

This is a personal data visualization and analysis portfolio built by **Pinn (Aiqi) Xu**.

The site collects data projects exploring real-world datasets through exploratory data analysis (EDA), statistical methods, and interactive visualizations. Projects are written in **R** and **Python**, rendered with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/).

## Topics Covered

- **NLP & Social Media** — sentiment analysis, text mining on social media data
- **EDA & Visualization** — uncovering patterns and trends in public datasets
- **Comparative Studies** — cross-country and demographic analyses

## Tools & Stack

| Category      | Tools                                        |
|---------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Languages     | R, Python                                    |
| Visualization | Ggplot2, Plotly, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Base R |
| Publishing    | Quarto, GitHub Pages                         |

## Contact

Feel free to reach out or explore the source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/pinn32).
